description: Letter to Eli b. Amram from a junior colleague, as court scribe, specifying the fees received for writing documents (marriage contracts, divorce documents, a power of attorney) during Eli's absence; also mentioning a power of attorney made out on behalf of an agunah to a welfare official who was going to Spain, where her husband was located.
description_he: מכתב לאלי בן עמרם מסופר בית דין, מפרט שכר שנגבה עבור כתיבת מסמכים בהיעדר אלי.
